title: Baking Paper | 50m Baking Parchment Paper | Premium Quality Greaseproof Paper for Kitchen Use,Oven Safe and Food Grade Material | Perfect for Pastries, Catering | by Caterserve
features: THE PERFECT SOLUTION: If you’re tired of frustrating, messy baking or freezing experiences in the kitchen, the CaterServe baking paper roll is definitely a smart solution for everyone, minimizing product waste and saving your time!

FINEST QUALITY PAPER: This baking parchment paper is made with premium quality, durable food-grade paper, guaranteed to withstand high temperatures. This parchment paper is compatible with most conventional ovens and microwave, being 100% freezer safe!

NON-STICK & RELIABLE: The CaterServe greaseproof paper has a non-stick practical texture, being ideal for safely baking or freezing all sorts of foods, snacks, sandwiches and more. Say goodbye to messy experiences and ruined ingredients with this smart solution!
CONVENIENT SIZE: Unlike similar products on the market, this parchment paper for baking comes in a convenient 50 meter long roll, having a 30cm width, covering all your baking needs!

MULTIPURPOSE & VERSATILE: This parchment paper baking is ideal for home and professional use, for baking cookies, pastry, storing sandwiches or snacks, for catering businesses, delivery, restaurants and more!
description: When it comes to our customer’s satisfaction, there’s no room for compromise. That’s why we have chosen to work only with top quality materials and verified suppliers, which are guaranteed to deliver to our high expectations.
